title: pinus nigra var. dalmatica
intro: Pinus nigra var. dalmatica, also known as the Dalmatian stone pine, is a variety of evergreen tree native to the Balkan Peninsula, characterized by its twisted trunk and long, dark green needles. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of terpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pinus nigra var. dalmatica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and resin extracts, which are used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
